overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy night in a historic Western town, beginning on a main street with a passing tram, continuing along covered sidewalks, through narrow rainy alleys, into a sheltered courtyard with dual staircases, and finally through a covered corridor toward a red lantern exit. Game engine footage with cinematic atmospheric lighting and fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with tram tracks and historic brick buildings

events.description: tram with headlights on approaches from down the street
tram passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the wet cobblestone main street of a historic town at night, approaching a parked carriage

notable_agents.action: electric tram approaching with bright headlights, then passing by on the right

entered.detail: two-story brick buildings with lit windows and wooden facades lining the street
parked wooden carriage with large wheels on the side of the road
tall ornate street lamps casting warm yellow light through the fog
metal tram tracks embedded in the wet cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a foggy night in a historic Western town, walking down a wet cobblestone main street lined with brick buildings. A horse-drawn carriage is parked ahead while gas lamps cast warm light through the mist. An electric tram approaches from the distance with bright headlights and passes by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden sidewalk with storefront awnings

events.description: turns left from the street onto the covered wooden sidewalk under awnings

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered boardwalk under wooden awnings, passing by shop windows

entered.detail: overhead wooden awning providing shelter over the sidewalk
lit shop windows with merchandise and displays visible inside
vertical wooden support pillars for the overhead awning
circular painted sign with an animal figure hanging above a doorway

segments.scene_description: Moving from the open street onto a covered wooden sidewalk, the camera walks under protective awnings supported by wooden pillars. Storefront windows with warm interior lighting line the left side, including a taxidermy shop with a distinctive circular sign. The street and tram tracks fall away to the right as the path continues under shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with heavy rain and tall brick walls

events.description: enters narrow alleyway from the covered sidewalk
heavy rain begins falling visibly in the alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow rain-soaked alley between tall brick buildings, heading toward distant light

entered.detail: tall wet brick walls on both sides creating a narrow passage
stacked wooden crates and boxes against the wall
heavy rain falling through beams of light, creating visible streaks
warm yellow light visible at the far end of the dark alley

segments.scene_description: Leaving the sheltered sidewalk, the scene transitions into a narrow enclosed alleyway where heavy rain begins to fall visibly through the darkness. Tall brick walls flank both sides with wooden crates stacked against them. The wet cobblestone ground reflects the sparse light as the camera moves toward a warm glow at the alley's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with dual staircases and archway passages

events.description: exits narrow alley into open courtyard with symmetrical staircases
warmer light from wall sconces illuminates the courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard toward the dual staircases and central archway exit

notable_agents.action: figure descending the right staircase toward the courtyard floor

entered.detail: symmetrical wooden staircases on left and right leading to upper balcony level
large arched stone passageway at the far end of the courtyard
lit wall-mounted lanterns casting warm orange light
empty wooden cart with large wheels in the courtyard center
large potted plants flanking doorways near the stairs

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley into a sheltered interior courtyard, the space opens to reveal symmetrical wooden staircases on both sides leading to an upper level. Wall sconces cast warm light on the stone pavement where a wooden cart sits in the center. A figure descends the right staircase as the camera approaches a large archway exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered corridor leading to street exit with red lantern

events.description: enters covered corridor from the courtyard
red lantern becomes visible hanging at the corridor exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit corridor toward the exit marked by a glowing red lantern

entered.detail: dark painted walls with wooden trim and paneling
illuminated red paper lantern hanging at the corridor exit
rotating ceiling fan visible overhead in the corridor
archway leading back to the street with visible exterior light

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered corridor from the courtyard, the surroundings become darker and more enclosed with painted walls and a rotating ceiling fan overhead. The camera walks toward a distant archway exit marked by a prominent glowing red paper lantern hanging in the center, with warm light spilling in from the street beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy historic town, moving from a wide, foggy main street into increasingly enclosed and sheltered architectural spaces. It begins on a wet cobblestone street where gas lamps pierce the mist and an electric tram passes by with bright headlights, before the camera shifts under the protective wooden awnings of a covered sidewalk lined with warm storefronts. As the path leaves the shelter, the scene transitions into a narrow, dark alleyway where heavy rain falls against tall brick walls and stacked crates, leading toward a distant glow. This enclosure then opens into a sheltered interior courtyard featuring symmetrical wooden staircases and a central cart, where a figure descends the stairs as the camera approaches a far archway. Finally, the movement carries into a dark, enclosed corridor with a rotating ceiling fan, progressing toward a glowing red paper lantern that marks the exit back toward the street.
